overview.description: Visual AI workflow automation platform that enables businesses to build, scale, and automate workflows and AI agents across 3,000+ apps without code
overview.description_long: Make (formerly Integromat) is the leading integration and automation development platform, empowering businesses across all verticals to visually design, build, and automate workflows and AI agents. The platform connects 3,000+ pre-built app integrations and supports agentic automation, enabling teams to orchestrate complex processes with transparency and control. Originally launched in 2012 as Integromat by Czech systems integrator Integrators.cz, the company was acquired by Celonis in October 2020 for over $100 million and rebranded to Make in February 2022. Today Make serves over 400,000 organizations in 200+ countries, with 100,000+ paying customers.
overview.tagline: Visual AI workflow automation that puts teams in control

history.origin_story: Built by the Czech systems integrator Integrators.cz as part of their work doing integration consulting for large Czech companies including banks. Launched as Integromat in 2012, the platform grew organically without external funding to 250K customers and $10M revenue by 2020.

key_milestones.event: Integromat launched by Integrators.cz in Prague
Acquired by Celonis (Munich-based, $2.5B valuation at time) for over $100M in October
Rebranded from Integromat to Make in February; launched as own business unit within Celonis
Approaching EUR 100M+ ARR; 15x revenue growth since acquisition; grew team from ~50 to ~400
Launched AI Agents, Agentic Automation, and MCP Server capabilities
Celonis raises $1B funding round, valued at $13B

financials.revenue_source: SaaSiest podcast Nov 2025 - CEO Fabian Q. Veit stated approaching EUR 100M+ ARR; 15x growth from ~$10M at acquisition

open_roles: Senior Back-end Software Engineer - Biz Tools
Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer - Product Platform
Senior Software Engineer - Developer Productivity team

partnerships.details: Acquired by Celonis in October 2020; operates as business unit within Celonis ($13B valuation)

sources_used: Google Search: Make Integromat Prague funding raised acquired Celonis
Brave Search: Make Integromat revenue ARR
SaaSiest podcast episode 200 (Nov 2025) with CEO Fabian Q. Veit
metadata.notes: Integromat was bootstrapped (no external funding raised before Celonis acquisition). Founders not named on current Make website as it operates as a Celonis business unit. Glassdoor blocked automated access. Revenue estimate based on CEO statement in Nov 2025 podcast about approaching EUR 100M+ ARR. Celonis parent company valued at $13B after $1B raise in 2025. Make has 50+ nationalities represented among 350+ employees. Platform ratings: Capterra 4.8/5 (404 reviews), G2 4.7/5 (238 reviews), Gartner 4.6/5 (20 reviews).
